name: City of Grove
description: City of Grove is a place to play pickleball in Grove, OK. There are 8 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Jay City Park
description: Courts have access to lights on a 30 minute timer available for use.  A second court will be painted and installed in the spring of 2025

name: The Racquet Club at Shangri-La
description: The Racquet Club at Shangri-La is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Afton, OK. There are 12 acrylic courts. 6 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Membership Perks, Open to the public with access fee.
